message:
The other day, I was making my famous mac and cheese (well, at least my kids think it’s famous!), and I suddenly remembered that I hadn't checked the smoke alarm in a while. You know, the one that usually chirps at the most inconvenient times? 😂 So, I took a quick break from my cheesy masterpiece and climbed up to the ceiling to give it a little love. Low and behold, it needed a battery change! 

It felt so good to finally be the prepared one, instead of scrambling last minute like I usually do. I also took a moment to review our escape plan with the kids, just in case. It's those little reminders that keep us all a bit safer and more at ease. 

Have you had a moment where you felt like the preparedness champion? Share your stories!
